objective: Make subagent-packet-check reject status-agent-rollup evidence commands unless they include current orchestration readiness, keeping trace evidence exempt, so manual subagent packets cannot drift from the stricter bootstrap/current evidence contract.

excluded: files and systems outside the declared allowed files

packets.objective: subagent-packet-check rejects status evidence without current readiness, accepts the primary flag and alias, keeps trace evidence accepted, and focused/full validation pass

budgets.context: Bounded to taskboard, docs, task, workflow, and evidence files.
budgets.validation: Focused tests plus taskboard validation and strict status evidence.

integration.policy: Lead integrates subagent findings, updates packet statuses before closeout, and keeps manifest refs tied to the machine evidence artifact.
